title: Aberdeen Half Marathon - New PB 1:35:44.🥳
hook: Aberdeen Half Marathon - New PB 1:35:44.🥳
caption:
Aberdeen Half Marathon - New PB 1:35:44.🥳
11th lady in my age category.💪

Absolutely buzzing to have taken 3.5 mins off my HM time today.🎉

In the first half of the race my head was full of doubts…

💭I slept so badly 2 nights ago.
💭I feel a bit sick, don’t think I can even stomach all my gels.
💭My legs feel a bit weak.
💭Not sure I can hold this pace. 

I had to give myself the pep talk…

👏I’ve trained well for this. 
👏 I’ve got the carbs on board for this.
👏 My body will do what my brain says it can.
👏 This course is so flat and the conditions are ideal.
👏 I CAN and I will.

And it worked! Sec

title: I’m not here to convince you that you need to work harder.
hook: I’m not here to convince you that you need to work harder.
caption:
Hi, I’m Emma. 👋

I’m not here to convince you that you need to work harder.

I’m here to show you that with the right plan, the right support, and the right approach, you can become stronger than you ever thought possible.

For years, I believed that if I just worked harder, I’d eventually reach my goals.

Like many women, I spent too much time following random workouts, chasing quick fixes, and feeling frustrated when nothing seemed to last.

Everything changed when I stopped training for perfection and started training with intention.

That philosophy has guided my coaching ever since.

Toda

Six weeks ago, she said...

Can you imagine the level of readiness and BALLS that that takes?

Your results matter to us, but more than that your well-being, happiness, and sustainability of those results.

Fast forward to today: she's nearly 10kg down. But that's not the only transformation in the making.

title: ✨ What if your handwriting has been quietly influencing your life all along? ✨
hook: ✨ What if your handwriting has been quietly influencing your life all along? ✨
caption:
✨ What if your handwriting has been quietly influencing your life all along? ✨

Most people think handwriting is just penmanship.

The truth is, it’s much more than that.

After more than 15 years studying handwriting analysis, graphology, and Letterology, I’ve discovered that your handwriting reflects unconscious patterns that influence the way you think, communicate, make decisions, build relationships, and pursue your goals.

Many of us work hard to change our lives…

title: If you've ever quit a fitness plan and decided the problem was you, read this.
hook: If you've ever quit a fitness plan and decided the problem was you, read this.
caption:
If you've ever quit a fitness plan and decided the problem was you, read this.
It wasn't your discipline. It was the plan.
This week I sat down with Bronwyn Barry, who builds fitness for actual humans with actual lives, the ones who don't have a perfect schedule, a perfect week, or the version of themselves from three years ago. Her whole approach flips the thing most programs get backwards: your plan should fit your life, not the other way around.
A few things from the conversation I keep thinking about 👇
→ You don't have one window to work out. You have four: 45 minutes at 5am, 20 at lunch,

title: STOP DRINKING YOUR CALORIES
hook: STOP DRINKING YOUR CALORIES
caption:
STOP DRINKING YOUR CALORIES

One of the easiest weight management tips doesn’t involve giving up your favorite foods...

It’s paying attention to what you’re drinking.

A fancy coffee.

A soda.

A sports drink.

A few glasses of juice.

An evening cocktail.

Those calories can add up quickly, and unlike whole foods, they often don’t leave you feeling full.

That doesn’t mean you can never enjoy them.

It simply means it’s worth asking yourself:

**”Is this drink helping me reach my goals, or is it just a habit?”**

Most of the time, choosing water, sparkling water, unsweetened tea, or black co

title: You have an unclear-values problem. A poor-time-management problem. A zero-accountability problem.
hook: You have an unclear-values problem. A poor-time-management problem. A zero-accountability problem.
caption:
You have an unclear-values problem. A poor-time-management problem. A zero-accountability problem.

Fitness is just where it shows up first.

Every man who has ever started a program with fire and quit three weeks later did the same thing: he grabbed a plan without understanding the person who was supposed to follow it. Not because he was weak. Because the plan was never built to hold his actual life.

His schedule. His triggers. His actual priorities underneath the ones he tells himself.

That is not a character flaw. That is a design flaw. And design flaws are fixable.

The first step is not

title: You don’t need to cut alcohol to get results…
hook: You don’t need to cut alcohol to get results…
caption:
You don’t need to cut alcohol to get results… 
But you do need to understand what it’s actually doing to your body.

Most busy women I speak to aren’t “failing” fat loss because of willpower.
It’s because no one’s ever shown them how to fit real life into the process.

Weekends, holidays, social events, a glass (or three) of wine 🍷 
Then Monday comes and you feel like you’ve undone everything.

That stop-start cycle? 
That’s what’s keeping you stuck.

The women I work with don’t avoid alcohol… 
They learn how to navigate it without sabotaging their progress.

Because fat loss at this level isn

title: A difficult week doesn’t always need a dramatic restart.
hook: A difficult week doesn’t always need a dramatic restart.
caption:
A difficult week doesn’t always need a dramatic restart.

Sometimes it needs one honest adjustment, one smaller action, and a plan that still fits the life you’re actually living.

The goal isn’t to never fall behind.

It’s to make the distance back shorter.

That’s part of what coaching is for.

DM “START” if you’re tired of turning every interruption into another restart.

#ConsistencyOverPerfection
#OnlineFitnessCoach
#HealthyHabits
#FitnessMindset
#SustainableFitness
